gray-950.description: Primary background — darkest surface used for main app background

gray-900.description: Secondary background — slightly lighter surface for elevated containers

gray-800-50.description: Semi-transparent overlay — used for modals, overlays, and dimmed surfaces

gray-900-40.description: Card surface — translucent background for card components

blue-100.description: Lightest blue — used for subtle highlights and backgrounds

blue-200.description: Light blue — used for hover states and secondary highlights

blue-300.description: Medium-light blue — used for heading text and active indicators

blue-400.description: Medium blue — used for links, interactive text, and info accents

blue-600.description: Primary blue — used for primary buttons and strong interactive elements

blue-700.description: Dark blue — used for pressed/active button states

blue-900.description: Deepest blue — used for borders, subtle dividers, and container outlines

green-500.description: Success — positive actions, confirmations, and success states

red-500.description: Destructive — errors, destructive actions, and danger states

yellow-500.description: Warning — caution indicators and warning states

amber-900.description: Caution background — muted amber surface for caution banners

green-900-30.description: Success background — translucent green surface for success alerts

red-900-30.description: Error background — translucent red surface for error alerts

yellow-900-30.description: Warning background — translucent yellow surface for warning alerts

default.description: Default/offline status — gray dot indicator for inactive or default state

success.description: Connected/success status — green dot indicator for active or connected state

error.description: Error status — red dot indicator for error or disconnected state

warning.description: Warning status — yellow dot indicator for warning or degraded state

info.description: Info status — blue dot indicator for informational state
